MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-04-2014 IN 206, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION TO EXCLUDE PLAINTIFFS' EXPERTS FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL. GENEVIEVE HOFFMAN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. MEGAN SYMONDS APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT DID NOT CONSIDER DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO EXCLUDE PLAINTIFFS' EXPERTS FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/8/14 IS CONTINUED TO 10/27/14 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED EXCEPT FOR DEPOSITIONS THAT HAVE ALREADY BEEN NOTICED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
